summary:
REQ-1 appears implemented: FooterSection no longer renders a second

attribution line; social links and copyright remain. However, two additional files were modified that were not requested, which may violate the constraint to apply changes only to the selected footer paragraph element.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified non-target files (project metadata / summaries) even though the request constrained changes to only the selected footer paragraph element.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraint: "Apply changes ONLY to the selected element identified by XPath ..." but the diff includes modifications to additional files unrelated to removing the footer attribution paragraph.
